compositionPolicy.semantics: The child remains the only rendered semantic element.
compositionPolicy.modality: The CSS strategy uses focus-visible and never suppresses the browser outline without replacement.
compositionPolicy.familySignature: Deep Violet remains distinct from green selection through an explicit Canvas seam; strong mode increases both layers independently.
compositionPolicy.advantage: A two-cue Deep Violet and Canvas treatment remains distinct from green selection and maps explicitly to system Highlight.
compositionPolicy.forcedColors: System Highlight supplies an explicit outline and the Canvas seam is removed.
compositionPolicy.enhancementOptOut: Leaving contrast unset selects standard geometry; no strong-mode UI, behavior, event, motion, or accessibility output remains.
